title: Bidens herzogii

The classification of Bidens herzogii is further detailed within the species' taxonomic hierarchy, including its kingdom, phylum, class, order, and family.

intro: Bidens herzogii, also known as Herzog's beggarticks, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
